enableAdminUser.description: Enable admin user (basic authentication) with cluster-admin permissions
enableAdminUser.title: enableAdminUser

enableCyberjokerUser.description: Enable cyberjoker user (basic authentication) with namespace-scoped permissions
enableCyberjokerUser.title: enableCyberjokerUser

enableDemoSystemNamespace.description: enabling the demo creates the demo-system namespace, deploys two Route resources within it, and grants permissions to the cyberjoker user if that user is enabled
enableDemoSystemNamespace.title: enableDemoSystemNamespace

observabilityConsoleUrl.description: Optional URL of the external observability console (e.g. the clickstack/HyperDX UI). When set, a "View in console" link appears on the /observability page and opens it in a new tab; empty hides the link. No default target is invented — a deployer must point this at their own console.
observabilityConsoleUrl.title: observabilityConsoleUrl

spokeReadbackCluster.description: W3-3 spoke read-back binding — the ONE registered spoke cluster whose /clusters/{name} detail page shows LIVE compositions read directly from the spoke apiserver (restaction cluster-compositions). snowplow endpointRef references are static (not jq-templated), so the read-back is bound per-install; generating a per-spoke RESTAction + endpoint Secret pair at registration time is the follow-up that removes this value.
spokeReadbackCluster.title: spokeReadbackCluster

spokeReadbackEndpointNamespace.description: Namespace of the derived spoke endpoint Secret (must be readable by snowplow's ServiceAccount; the authn namespace krateo-system is the canonical home, same place the registration flow keeps the kubeconfig Secret).
spokeReadbackEndpointNamespace.title: spokeReadbackEndpointNamespace

spokeReadbackEndpointSecret.description: Name of the DERIVED endpoint Secret for the spoke read-back — snowplow endpoint shape {server-url, token, insecure, certificate-authority-data}, derived from the registered spoke's kubeconfig Secret (NOT the kubeconfig Secret itself, which snowplow cannot consume). The server-url deliberately carries the /apis suffix; see restaction.cluster-compositions.yaml for why.
spokeReadbackEndpointSecret.title: spokeReadbackEndpointSecret

tenant.description: Display name of the platform tenant — shown in the sider tenant chip and the page eyebrows (dashboard greeting, compositions, observability). A deployer-set label, not derived data; defaults to krateo-enterprise.
tenant.title: tenant
